title: T-002 — finance_settings + currencies + exchange_rates schema (§6.1 rows 1/3/4)
prompt:
# T-002 — Finance setup core schema (settings + currencies + FX)

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §6.1 rows 1, 3, 4; §6.4 DDL sketch (lines 274-289 finance_settings); §11.1 V-FIN-SETUP-01..03; §14.1 L2 per-tenant config; §5.5 GBP base for Apex.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create Drizzle migration + ORM entries for `finance_settings`, `currencies`, `exchange_rates` with `org_id` business-scope (Wave0 v4.3) + RLS USING `app.current_org_id()` foundation function. Enforces V-FIN-SETUP-01 (1 finance_settings row per org), V-FIN-SETUP-02 (≥1 currency WHERE is_base=true).

## Implementation contract
1. New migration `packages/db/migrations/0050_finance_setup.sql`:
   - `CREATE TABLE finance_settings` per PRD §6.4 DDL (id, org_id, default_valuation_method CHECK IN ('fifo','wac'), default_currency_id FK→currencies(id), variance_calculation_enabled, critical_approval_pin_required, d365_integration_enabled, d365_consolidation_cutoff_time, ext_jsonb, created_at, updated_at; UNIQUE(org_id)).
   - `CREATE TABLE currencies` (id, org_id, code TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (code ~ '^[A-Z]{3}$'), name TEXT, is_base BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, decimal_places INTEGER DEFAULT 2, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, created_at, updated_at; UNIQUE(org_id, code)).
   - `CREATE TABLE exchange_rates` (id, org_id, currency_id FK, rate NUMERIC(15,6) NOT NULL CHECK (rate > 0), effective_date DATE NOT NULL, source_type TEXT CHECK IN ('manual','api'), source_reference TEXT, reason TEXT, created_by UUID FK→users(id), created_at; UNIQUE(org_id, currency_id, effective_date)).
   - All three tables: ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY.
   - Policy `<table>_org_context` USING (`org_id = app.current_org_id()`) WITH CHECK (`org_id = app.current_org_id()`) — never read `current_setting('app.current_org_id')` GUC directly.
   - Partial unique index `idx_currencies_base_per_org ON currencies (org_id) WHERE is_base=true` — enforces V-FIN-SETUP-02.
   - Index `idx_exchange_rates_lookup ON exchange_rates (org_id, currency_id, effective_date DESC)`.
2. Drizzle ORM entries: `packages/db/src/schema/finance-settings.ts`, `currencies.ts`, `exchange-rates.ts` + register in `packages/db/src/schema/index.ts`.
3. R13 audit trigger: append rows to `audit_events` on INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE for `finance_settings` (per Foundation T-040 R13 pattern; reuse existing audit infrastructure).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0050_finance_setup.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/finance-settings.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/currencies.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/exchange-rates.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/finance-setup-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given migration 0050 runs on a fresh DB, when \d on finance_settings/currencies/exchange_rates is inspected, then all three tables exist with org_id NOT NULL + RLS + FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY enabled, and pg_policies references app.current_org_id().
- Given two orgs A and B with set_org_context, when each inserts finance_settings(org_id=own), then SELECT under each session returns only its own row.
- Given org A inserted a currencies row with is_base=true, when org A inserts a second is_base=true row, then it fails with unique-index violation (V-FIN-SETUP-02).
- Given an exchange_rates row with rate <= 0, when INSERT runs, then it fails with CHECK constraint violation. AND given finance_settings.default_valuation_method='invalid', when INSERT runs, then it fails with CHECK constraint violation (only 'fifo' / 'wac' allowed).
_(AC count consolidated from 5→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: `packages/db/__tests__/finance-setup-schema.test.ts` asserts all 5 ACs (RLS, partial unique base currency, rate>0 CHECK, valuation method enum, pg_policies references foundation function); connect as `app_user`, call `app.set_org_context(...)` per org.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test finance-setup-schema`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not read `current_setting('app.current_org_id')` directly in policies — use foundation `app.current_org_id()` function (per Wave0; foundation T-125).
- Do not name the scope column `tenant_id`; per Wave0 v4.3 it is `org_id`.
- Do not omit FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY (table-owner bypass risk).
- Do not add cascade DELETE on the org FK (orgs are not deleted in this migration).
- Do not hardcode `currencies.code='GBP'` in schema — base currency is seeded per-org via T-008.
- Do not skip the partial unique index for base currency — V-FIN-SETUP-02 hinges on it.

pipeline_inputs.description: finance_settings + currencies + exchange_rates schema with org-scoped RLS via foundation app.current_org_id().
pipeline_inputs.details: Three new tables per §6.4 DDL sketch with strict CHECK constraints (valuation method enum, currency ISO regex, rate>0), partial unique index for is_base=true to enforce V-FIN-SETUP-02 (≥1 base currency per org), and R13 audit trigger on finance_settings mutations. RLS uses foundation function not GUC. exchange_rates supports manual entry P1 + API source field for P2 OQ-FIN-03 ECB/XE auto-sync. [AC count consolidated from 5→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost)]

Given org A inserted a currencies row with is_base=true, when org A inserts a second is_base=true row, then it fails with unique-index violation (V-FIN-SETUP-02).

Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test finance-setup-schema'.
